allow: Bash(ssh -V)

Bash(/tmp/rssh.sh 'echo amd123 | sudo -S bash -c "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq ca-certificates curl gnupg 2>&1 | tail -3"')
Bash(/tmp/rssh.sh 'curl -fsS -m 10 -o /dev/null -w "docker.com: %{http_code}\\n" https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg 2>&1; apt-cache policy docker.io 2>/dev/null | head -3')
Bash(/tmp/rssh.sh 'echo amd123 | sudo -S bash -c "DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y -qq docker.io docker-compose-v2 2>&1 | tail -5"')

Bash(tar --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.next' --exclude='__pycache__' --exclude='*.pyc' --exclude='.git' -czf /tmp/fleet-monitor.tar.gz .)
